items.title: Classification and Regression Trees (Breiman et al., 1984)
items.author: Leo Breiman, Jerome Friedman, Richard Olshen, Charles Stone
items.note: Original CART monograph — binary trees, Gini impurity, regression variance splits, pruning.

items.title: The Elements of Statistical Learning (Hastie, Tibshirani, Friedman)
items.author: Hastie, Tibshirani, Friedman
items.note: Chapter 9 on tree-based methods: split finding, impurity, pruning, and ensembles.

items.title: Induction of Decision Trees (Quinlan, 1986 — ID3)
items.author: J. Ross Quinlan
items.note: Entropy and information gain for automated tree induction — historical foundation for impurity-based splits.

items.title: scikit-learn DecisionTreeClassifier documentation
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: CART implementation: criterion gini/entropy, max_depth, min_samples_leaf, feature_importances_.

items.title: Pattern Recognition and Machine Learning (Bishop)
items.author: Christopher M. Bishop
items.note: Decision trees section: impurity measures, tree construction, and comparison to other classifiers.
